title: rubus tereticaulis subsp. derasus
intro: Rubus tereticaulis subsp. derasus is a type of raspberry plant, commonly known as a wild raspberry, which belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of ellagic acid and other phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Rubus tereticaulis subsp. derasus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against certain types of cancer. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and dried extract, which can be used to leverage its health benefits.
